title: axy's Honey Note-ify
description: Indicates if a beehive is full of honey with an eye-catching sticky note!
body:
## Honey Note-ify
![A picture of a build showcasing the custom beehive models in a cherry grove biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/311fc3b8ebe8263ac19ae57f561be2fe3a43f827.png)

###  So what does this texture pack do?
This texture pack adds a sticky note to the **Beehive** block model to clearly indicate if the Beehive is full of honey. This pack is meant to pair with any  texture pack that gives Beehives visible honey stage/progression textures.

To avoid any confusion, the **Bee Nest** block model is not affected by this pack and  still features its Vanilla texture and model.

###  Additional details
- This pack is expected to work as intended for versions beyond 1.21.x
- Using this pack versions below 1.21.x may be subject to visual errors
- Mods are not required to use this pack
- Submit a support request on my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/HZbvM2KBnR) if you encounter any issues

###  Social links
- Want to support me? Send a tip over on my [Ko-fi page](ko-fi.com/axyeatsrocks)! :D
- Join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/HZbvM2KBnR) if you wish to get updates on my texture packs!
